languages.text: "Ваша Светлость!" {n}Обернувшись, вы видите, как вас нагоняет капитан-интендант. Дунавски замирает напротив, вытягивается по струнке и отдает честь.{/n} "Капитан-интендант Дунавски прибыла в качестве подкрепления. Каков план операции?"

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}You turn around to see the captain-quartermaster catching up to you. Dunawski comes to a halt in front of you, stands to attention, and salutes.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski reporting for duty. I am here to serve as reinforcement. What is the plan of operation?"
languages.original_text: "Ваша Светлость!" {n}Обернувшись, вы видите, как вас нагоняет капитан-интендант. Дунавски замирает напротив, вытягивается по струнке и отдает честь.{/n} "Капитан-интендант Дунавски прибыла в качестве подкрепления. Каков план операции?"

Dunawski comes to a halt in front of you, draws herself up straight, and salutes.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski reporting for duty. I am here to serve as reinforcement. What is the plan of operation?"

Dunawski comes to a halt in front of you, draws herself up straight, and salutes.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski reporting for duty. I am here to serve as reinforcement. What is the plan of operation?"

"Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}You turn around to see the captain-quartermaster catching up to you. Dunawski comes to a halt in front of you, stands to attention, and salutes.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski reporting for duty. I am here to serve as reinforcement. What is the plan of operation?"

languages.text: 「御座候！」{n}振り返ると、艦長補佐が追いかけてきた。ダナウスキは立ち止まり、背筋を伸ばして敬礼する。「艦長補佐ダナウスキ、勤務開始。増援として参りました。作戦の予定は？」{/n}
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}You turn around to see the captain-quartermaster catching up to you. Dunawski comes to a halt in front of you, draws herself up straight, and salutes.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski reporting for duty. I am here to serve as reinforcement. What is the plan of operation?"

traits.locale_text: 「御座候！」{n}振り返ると、艦長補佐が追いかけてきた。ダナウスキは立ち止まり、背筋を伸ばして敬礼する。「艦長補佐ダナウスキ、勤務開始。増援として参りました。作戦の予定は？」{/n}

languages.text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri!" {n}Arkanı dönüyorsun ve Levazımcı Yüzbaşı'nın sana yetiştiğini görüyorsun. Dunawski önünde duruyor, hazır ola geçip selam veriyor.{/n} "Levazımcı Yüzbaşı Dunawski görev ve emirlerinize hazırdır. Takviye kuvvet olarak hizmet etmek için buradayım. Harekât planı nedir?"
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}You turn around to see the captain-quartermaster catching up to you. Dunawski comes to a halt in front of you, stands to attention, and salutes.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski reporting for duty. I am here to serve as reinforcement. What is the plan of operation?"

traits.locale_text: "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri!" {n}Arkanı dönüyorsun ve Levazımcı Yüzbaşı'nın sana yetiştiğini görüyorsun. Dunawski önünde duruyor, hazır ola geçip selam veriyor.{/n} "Levazımcı Yüzbaşı Dunawski görev ve emirlerinize hazırdır. Takviye kuvvet olarak hizmet etmek için buradayım. Harekât planı nedir?"

languages.text: «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}!». {n}Te giras para ver a la capitana intendente acercándose a ti a buen paso. Dunawski se detiene, se pone firme y saluda.{/n} «Capitana intendente Dunawski, lista para servir. Estoy aquí como refuerzo. ¿Cuál es su plan de acción?».
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}You turn around to see the captain-quartermaster catching up to you. Dunawski comes to a halt in front of you, stands to attention, and salutes.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski reporting for duty. I am here to serve as reinforcement. What is the plan of operation?"

traits.locale_text: «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}!». {n}Te giras para ver a la capitana intendente acercándose a ti a buen paso. Dunawski se detiene, se pone firme y saluda.{/n} «Capitana intendente Dunawski, lista para servir. Estoy aquí como refuerzo. ¿Cuál es su plan de acción?».

languages.text: “大人！”{n}你转身看见军需官上尉追了上来。杜纳芙斯卡在你面前站定，立正敬礼。{/n}“军需官上尉杜纳芙斯卡前来增援，向您报到。请下达作战指令。”
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}You turn around to see the captain-quartermaster catching up to you. Dunawski comes to a halt in front of you, stands to attention, and salutes.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski reporting for duty. I am here to serve as reinforcement. What is the plan of operation?"

traits.locale_text: “大人！”{n}你转身看见军需官上尉追了上来。杜纳芙斯卡在你面前站定，立正敬礼。{/n}“军需官上尉杜纳芙斯卡前来增援，向您报到。请下达作战指令。”

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie ! » {n}Lorsque vous vous retournez, vous voyez la capitaine-quartier-maître vous rejoindre. Elle s'arrête devant vous, se met au garde-à-vous et vous salue.{/n} « Capitaine-quartier-maître Dunawski au rapport. Je viens en renfort. Comment comptez-vous procéder ? »
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}You turn around to see the captain-quartermaster catching up to you. Dunawski comes to a halt in front of you, stands to attention, and salutes.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski reporting for duty. I am here to serve as reinforcement. What is the plan of operation?"

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie ! » {n}Lorsque vous vous retournez, vous voyez la capitaine-quartier-maître vous rejoindre. Elle s'arrête devant vous, se met au garde-à-vous et vous salue.{/n} « Capitaine-quartier-maître Dunawski au rapport. Je viens en renfort. Comment comptez-vous procéder ? »

languages.text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}!" {n}Als du dich umwendest, siehst du die Captain-Quartiermeisterin auf dich zukommen. Dunawski bleibt vor dir stehen, nimmt Haltung an und salutiert.{/n} "Captain-Quartiermeisterin Dunawski meldet sich zum Dienst. Ich bin hier, um Euch zu unterstützen. Wie lautet der Plan der Operation?"
languages.original_text: "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}!" {n}You turn around to see the captain-quartermaster catching up to you. Dunawski comes to a halt in front of you, stands to attention, and salutes.{/n} "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski reporting for duty. I am here to serve as reinforcement. What is the plan of operation?"

traits.locale_text: "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}!" {n}Als du dich umwendest, siehst du die Captain-Quartiermeisterin auf dich zukommen. Dunawski bleibt vor dir stehen, nimmt Haltung an und salutiert.{/n} "Captain-Quartiermeisterin Dunawski meldet sich zum Dienst. Ich bin hier, um Euch zu unterstützen. Wie lautet der Plan der Operation?"
